_meta.author: sshahaider
_meta.title: Drawer
_meta.description: A flexible and beautifully styled Drawer component built using Vaul (Radix-based) primitives. It supports all drawer directions (top, bottom, left, right) with smooth animations, backdrop blur, and slots like header, body, and footer—making it ideal for responsive menus, sidebars, or modal-like panels in modern React apps.
